task_completion.description: Verify that the target folder for the Talon scripts was created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: File explorer or code editor file tree shows a folder named 'cjis_audit' located at 'C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\talon\user\'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Python script monitors application activation and deactivation for the specified apps.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Python code visible in an editor showing event listeners for app activation/deactivation (e.g., using Talon's `ui.register`) and conditional checks for 'notepad.exe', 'mspaint.exe', and 'wordpad.exe' (case-insensitive).

task_completion.description: Verify that the Python script logs events to the correct CSV file with the correct format.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Python code showing file append operations to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\cjis_audit_log.csv' and formatting strings matching 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS,EVENT_TYPE,APP_NAME'.

task_completion.description: Verify that a custom Talon action is implemented for manual log notes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Python code showing a Talon action definition (e.g., `@mod.action_class`) for `audit_log_note(note: str)` that appends entries to the CSV with the 'MANUAL_NOTE' event type.

task_completion.description: Verify that a .talon file maps the voice command to the custom action.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A `.talon` file visible in the editor containing the command `audit note <user.text>:` (or similar syntax) mapped to call `user.audit_log_note()`.

integrity.description: Check that the agent actually authored the scripts using a text editor or IDE.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent typing or pasting code into a text editor (e.g., VS Code, Notepad) rather than just echoing text blindly from a terminal.

integrity.description: Check that the agent did not manually create a fake CSV file to bypass writing the actual logging logic.
integrity.visual_evidence: The CSV file should be generated or modified by the script's execution, not manually typed out by the agent in a spreadsheet or text editor with mock data.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target folder for scripts: C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\talon\user\cjis_audit\. Expected CSV log file path: C:\Users\Docker\Documents\cjis_audit_log.csv.
